# Daniel Baran
> Senior IT Project & Product Manager for IT project delivery, product ownership, AI enablement, streaming infrastructure and cross-functional delivery in Europe.

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://daniel-baran.com/): Positioning, services, selected proof points, availability and contact for project inquiries.
- [About](https://daniel-baran.com/ueber-mich/): Experience, working style, certifications, languages and practical toolkit.
- [Projects](https://daniel-baran.com/projekte/): Case studies from media, AI, streaming, metaverse, startup, fashion tech and automotive contexts.
- [SWR AI recommendations](https://daniel-baran.com/projekte/swr-ki-empfehlungsengine/): Product ownership for an AI recommendation system in production.
- [ARD multiplatform service](https://daniel-baran.com/projekte/swr-multiplatform-service/): Cloud-native streaming infrastructure and manifest logic.
- [MAN/VW system migration](https://daniel-baran.com/projekte/systemmigration-konzernverbund/): Interface steering and support setup for a central workshop system.

## Key facts
- Focus areas: IT project management, product ownership, AI enablement, cloud and streaming delivery.
- Industries represented in case studies: public media, automotive, entertainment, fashion tech and startups.
- Languages: German, English and Polish.
- Location: Poland, remote collaboration across Europe.
- Contact: kontakt@daniel-baran.com

## Entity links
- Website: https://daniel-baran.com/
